TEXT.citation: Gravius, Daniël. 1661. Het Heylige Evangelium Matthei en Johannis ofte Hagnau Ka D'llig Matiktik. Ka na sasoulat ti Mattheus, ti Johannes appa. Overgeset inde Formosaansche tale, voor de Inwoonders van Soulang, Mattau, Sinckan, Bacloan, Tavocan en Tevorang. Amsterdam: Michiel Hartogh.

S.FORM: . Irou ka mali-æuragh, ni-kmytta ki saat ki vouel ka mavoutta ki na tan-næi tou pei-rauwei-en.
. Irou ka mali-æuragh, ni-kmytta ki saat ki vouel ka mavoutta ki na tan-næi tou pei-rauwei-en.
S.TRANS: Ende boor-by gaende sagh hy eenen mensche blint bande geboorte af.
And as Jesus passed by, he saw a man which was blind from his birth.
耶穌過去的時候，看見一個人生來是瞎眼的。

S.FORM: Ka ni-tmaligh tyni-æn ta Pæhta-tæutæu-han tyn, kma, Rabbi, ti-mang ta pou-varau, ti atta kauwa, ki tæ'i-alak kauwa tyni-æn, ka ni-pei-voutta-an mei-alak ta teni?
Ka ni-tmaligh tyni-æn ta Pæhtatæutæu-han tyn, kma, Rabbi, ti-mang ta pou-varau, ti atta kauwa, ki tæ'i-alak kauwa tyni-æn, ka ni-pei-voutta-an mei-alak ta teni?
S.TRANS: Ende sijne Discipulen braeghden hem seggende Rabbi wie heeft'er gesondight Dese ofte sijne onders dat hy blindt soude gebooren worden :
And his disciples asked him, saying, Master, who did sin, this man, or his parents, that he was born blind?
門徒問耶穌說：「拉比，這人生來是瞎眼的，是誰犯了罪？是這人呢？是他父母呢？」

S.FORM: Ni-mattæ'i-v'lli ta ti Jesus, Assi ni-pouvarau ta ti atta, assi ki tæ'i-alak tyni-æn: râ [ni-pam't-ten-ato ta atta] ka pa-ka-æmæ'-auh paka-koua 'tyni-æn tapei-ryngei eih ki Alid.
Ni-mattæ'i-v'lli ta ti Jesus, Assi ni-pouvarau ta ti atta, assi ki tæ'i-alak tyni-æn: râ [ni-pam't-ten-ato ta atta] ka pa-ka-æmæ'-auh paka-koua 'tyni-æn tapei-ryngei eih ki Alid.
S.TRANS: Jesus antwoordde Noch dese en Heeft ghesonDight noch sijne ouders: maer [dits is gefchiet] op Dat De wercken. Godts in hem sou-souden geopenbatrt worden.
Jesus answered, Neither hath this man sinned, nor his parents: but that the works of God should be made manifest in him.
耶穌回答說：「也不是這人犯了罪，也不是他父母犯了罪，是要在他身上顯出上帝的作為來。

S.FORM: Kidi-ato ka kapoungas-au mau ta ryngei tyn ka nimadingi jau-an, rou a-koume-'appa ta wæi: ierroua-ah ta-euvan, ka assi ma-lpoug-a' mapoungas ta ti mamang.
Kidi-ato ka kapoungas-au mau ta ryngei tyn ka nimadingi jau-an, rou a-koume-'appa ta wæi: ierroua-ah ta-euvan, ka assi ma-lpoug-a' mapoungas ta ti mamang.
S.TRANS: Ick moet wercken De wercken Des genen die my gesonden Heeft soo langh het dagh is : De nacht komt wanneer niemandt wercken En kana.
I must work the works of him that sent me, while it is day: the night cometh, when no man can work.
趁着白日，我們必須做那差我來者的工；黑夜將到，就沒有人能做工了。

S.FORM: Rou ia-koua app'-'oh touni, ræmh-koh ki ni.
Rou ia-koua app'-'oh touni, ræmh-koh ki ni.
S.TRANS: So lange ick in De wereldt ben soo ben ick Het licht der wereldt.
As long as I am in the world, I am the light of the world.
我在世上的時候，是世上的光。」

S.FORM: Irou ka ni-matti-kaha ki atta, ni-pangarei-en tyn tou næi, si-loutta louttak ki na ngarei , ka ni-hmeik ki louttak k''anna tou matta ki mavoutta.
Irou ka ni-matti-kaha ki atta, ni-pangarei-en tyn tou næi, si-loutta louttak ki na ngarei , ka ni-hmeik ki louttak k''anna tou matta ki mavoutta.
S.TRANS: Dit geseght hebbende spoogh hy op de aerde ende maeckte siick uyt Dat speecksel ende streeck dat siick op De oogen des blinden.
When he had thus spoken, he spat on the ground, and made clay of the spittle, and he anointed the eyes of the blind man with the clay,
耶穌說了這話，就吐唾沫在地上，用唾沫和泥抹在瞎子的眼睛上，

S.FORM: Ka ni-koun tyn tyni-æn, 'Ou-kou-koua madioep-pa [ym-houan] tou æizug-han ki Siloe (ka pattæ'i-toun noun-nun ki sou, ni-padingi-en.) Ka ni-'ouk-oun tyn madi oep[tyni-æn,] ka ieroua-ato ka kmyt'-ato.
Ka ni-koun tyn tyni-æn, 'Ou-kou-koua madioep-pa [ym-houan] tou æizug-han ki Siloe (ka pattæ'i-toun noun-nun ki sou, ni-padingi-en.) Ka ni-'ouk-oun tyn madi oep[tyni-æn,] ka ieroua-ato ka kmyt'-ato.
S.TRANS: Ende seyde tot hem Gaet Henen wascht u in het badt-water Siloam (het welk obergeset wordt uytgesonden.) Hy Dan gingh henen ende wiesch hem ende quam siende.
And said unto him, Go, wash in the pool of Siloam, (which is by interpretation, Sent.) He went his way therefore, and washed, and came seeing.
對他說：「你往西羅亞池子裏去洗。」（西羅亞翻出來就是「奉差遣」。） 他去一洗，回頭就看見了。

S.FORM: Annata kahalahalau-an, ne-ni-appa ka ni-kmytta tyni-n ka-lahei ka mavoutta-appa, ta ni-k'ma, Assi kauwa teni ta ni-mier-raoung kanna tmoumymmia ki tæ'-esh ki harum?
Annata kahalahalau-an, ne-ni-appa ka ni-kmytta tyni-n ka-lahei ka mavoutta-appa, ta ni-k'ma, Assi kauwa teni ta ni-mier-raoung kanna tmoumymmia ki tæ'-esh ki harum?
S.TRANS: De gebueren dan ende Die hem te boren gesien hadden dat hy blint was seyden Is Dese niet Die sat ende beDelde :
The neighbours therefore, and they which before had seen him that he was blind, said, Is not this he that sat and begged?
他的鄰舍和那素常見他是討飯的，就說：「這不是那從前坐着討飯的人嗎？」

S.FORM: Ni-k''ma tararouma, Teni k'anna: rarouma-appa, Mahau-wei tyni-æn. Ni-k'ma ta teni, Ti jau k'atta.
Ni-k''ma tararouma, Teni k'anna: rarouma-appa, Mahau-wei tyni-æn. Ni-k'ma ta teni, Ti jau k'atta.
S.TRANS: Andere seyden Hy is 't : ende andere Hy is hem gelijck. Hy seyde Ick ben't.
Some said, This is he: others said, He is like him: but he said, I am he.
有人說：「是他」；又有人說：「不是，卻是像他。」他自己說：「是我。」

S.FORM: Annatanik'ma ta neni ty-ni, Ni-pa-r'kyllat-ten ke wmama ki mang ki matta ?
Annatanik'ma ta neni tyni, Ni-pa-r'kyllat-ten ke wmama ki mang ki matta ?
S.TRANS: Sy Dan seyden tot hem Hoe zijn u De oogen geopent:
Therefore said they unto him, How were thine eyes opened?
他們對他說：「你的眼睛是怎麼開的呢？」

S.FORM: Ni-mattæ'i-v'lli ta teni kma, Vouel k'anna ka pa-nanang-en Jesus ta ni-si-loutta louttak ki na gnarei hmeik ki matta-au, ka koun-tyn jau-an, 'Ou kou-a tou 'æi-æug-han ki Siloë, madioep ym-hou-an. Ka ni-mou-koua-koh madioep jau-an, kakmytt'-âto koh.

Ni-mattæ'i-v'lli ta teni kma, Vouel k'anna ka pa-nanang-en Jesus ta ni-si-loutta louttak ki na gnarei hmeik ki matta-au, ka koun-tyn jau-an, 'Ou koua tou 'æi-æug-han ki Siloë, madioep ym-hou-an. Ka ni-mou-koua-koh madioep jau-an, kakmytt'-âto koh.
S.TRANS: Hy Hy antoordde ende seyde De mensche genaemt Jesus maeckte siick ende be= streeck mijne oogen en seyde tot my Gaet Henen aen Het badt-water Siloam ende wascht u. Ende ick gingh wnen ende wiesch my ende ick wierdt siende.
He answered and said, A man that is called Jesus made clay, and anointed mine eyes, and said unto me, Go to the pool of Siloam, and wash: and I went and washed, and I received sight.
他回答說：「有一個人，名叫耶穌，他和泥抹我的眼睛，對我說：『你往西羅亞池子去洗。』我去一洗，就看見了。」

S.FORM: Annata ni-k'ma ta neni ty-ni-æn, tou-mang ta teni kanna? Ni-k'ma [ta teni,] Assi-mau ou-mh-'an-ato.
Annata ni-k'ma ta neni ty-ni-æn, tou-mang ta teni kanna? Ni-k'ma [ta teni,] Assi-mau ou-mh-'an-ato.
S.TRANS: Sy Dan seyden tot hem waer is die: Hy seyde Ick en weet Het niet.
Then said they unto him, Where is he? He said, I know not.
他們說：「那個人在哪裏？」他說：「我不知道。」

S.FORM: Ka ni-'æd nein pa-'ou-koua tyni-æn ki Fariseen, tyni-æn k'anna ka ni-mavoutta kala-hey.
Ka ni-'æd nein pa-'ou-koua tyni-æn ki Fariseen, tyni-æn k'anna ka ni-mavoutta kala-hey.
S.TRANS: Sy brochten hem tot de Phariseen Hem [namelick] die te boren blindt [geweest was].
They brought to the Pharisees him that aforetime was blind.
他們把從前瞎眼的人帶到法利賽人那裏。

S.FORM: Ka na wæ'i-ato ki pæ'i-habab-an, rou ni-si-loutta lout-tak ta ti Jesus ki na ngarey pa-rkyllat ki matta tyn.
Ka na wæ'i-ato ki pæ'i-habab-an, rou ni-si-loutta lout-tak ta ti Jesus ki na ngarey pa-rkyllat ki matta tyn.
S.TRANS: Ende het was Sabbath als Jesus Het sliick maeckte ende sijne oogen opende.
And it was the sabbath day when Jesus made the clay, and opened his eyes.
耶穌和泥開他眼睛的日子是安息日。

S.FORM: Annata ni tmauka-la-appa tmaligh tyni-æn ta Fariseen, ma-ma ki mang ka kytt'an-nato tyn? Ni-k'ma ta teni neini-æn, Ni-heik-kin tyn ta louttak tou mat-ta-au, ka ni-madioep-koh jau-an, kakmytt'-âto-koh.

Annata ni tmauka-la-appa tmaligh tyni-æn ta Fariseen, ma-ma ki mang ka kytt'an-nato tyn? Ni-k'ma ta teni neini-æn, Ni-heik-kin tyn ta louttak tou mat-ta-au, ka ni-madioep-koh jau-an, kakmytt'-âto-koh.
S.TRANS: De Phariseen Dan braeghden Hem oock wederom hoe hy siende geworden Was: Ende hy seyde tat haer Hy leyde sliick Op mijne oogen ende ick wiesch my enDe ick sie
Then again the Pharisees also asked him how he had received his sight. He said unto them, He put clay upon mine eyes, and I washed, and do see.
法利賽人也問他是怎麼得看見的。瞎子對他們說：「他把泥抹在我的眼睛上，我去一洗，就看見了。」

S.FORM: Annata ni-k'mata rarou-ma ki Fariseen, Assi ni-makka-koua ki Alid ta vouel k'annâ: alei ka assi tyn 'illig-hen ta wæ'i ki Pæ'i-hababan. Ni-kma ta rarou-ma, Pa-lpough mama ki mang ta ta'u ka tama-kavarau pamut ki pou-kidi-en ka kma-hynna? Ka mæ-mæu-dou ha-'tota sou nein.

Annata ni-k'mata rarou-ma ki Fariseen, Assi ni-makka-koua ki Alid ta vouel k'annâ: alei ka assi tyn 'illig-hen ta wæ'i ki Pæ'i-hababan. Ni-kma ta rarou-ma, Pa-lpough mama ki mang ta ta'u ka tama-kavarau pamut ki pou-kidi-en ka kma-hynna? Ka mæ-mæu-dou ha-'tota sou nein.
S.TRANS: Somminge dan uyt de Phariseen seyden- Dese menche en is ban Godt niet: want hy en Houdt den Sabbath niet. Andere seyden Hoe kan een mensche [die] een sondaer is sulcke teeckenen nen doen : Ende daer was tweedracht onderhaer.

Therefore said some of the Pharisees, This man is not of God, because he keepeth not the sabbath day. Others said, How can a man that is a sinner do such miracles? And there was a division among them.
法利賽人中有的說：「這個人不是從上帝來的，因為他不守安息日。」又有人說：「一個罪人怎能行這樣的神蹟呢？」他們就起了紛爭。

S.FORM: Ni-mattæ'i-la ta neni ki ni-mavouta, Ymhou, matt'i-mang kow alei tyni-æn, ka ni-pa-rkyllat-ten tyn ta matta oho? Ni kma ta teni, Tama-Matt æi-tan ta ti anna.
Ni-mattæ'i-la ta neni ki ni-mavouta, Ymhou, matt'i-mang kow alei tyni-æn, ka ni-pa-rkyllat-ten tyn ta matta oho? Ni kma ta teni, Tama-Matt æi-tan ta ti anna.
S.TRANS: Sy seyden wederom tot den blinden Ghy wat seght ghy ban hem bewijle hy uwe oogen geopent heeft ? Ende hy seyde Hy is een Propheet.
They say unto the blind man again, What sayest thou of him, that he hath opened thine eyes? He said, He is a prophet.
他們又對瞎子說：「他既然開了你的眼睛，你說他是怎樣的人呢？」他說：「是個先知。」

S.FORM: Annata asfi ni-tna-'msing ta Joden tyni-æn, ka ni-mavoutta ta teni kalahei, ka kmytta-ito hnyn , tou kidi-appa kanna ki ni-tætææm ne-in ta tæ'i-alak tyni-n, ka kmytta-ato.
Annata asfi ni-tna-'msing ta Joden tyni-æn, ka ni-mavoutta ta teni kalahei, ka kmytta-ito hnyn , tou kidi-appa kanna ki ni-tætææm nein ta tæ'i-alak tyni-n, ka kmytta-ato.
S.TRANS: . De Joden dan en geloofden ban hem niet dat Hy bindt gemeest was ende siende was geworden tot Dat sy geroepen Hadden De ouders des ghenen Die siemDe geworden was.
But the Jews did not believe concerning him, that he had been blind, and received his sight, until they called the parents of him that had received his sight.
猶太人不信他從前是瞎眼，後來能看見的，等到叫了他的父母來，

S.FORM: Ka ni-tmaligh ta neni k''ma neini-æn, Alak-oumi kauwa ta ti atta ka ni-pei-voutta-an mei-alak koun-noumi?Mama ki mang ka kmytt'-Ato hayn?
Ka ni-tmaligh ta neni k''ma neini-æn, Alak-oumi kauwa ta ti atta ka ni-pei-voutta-an mei-alak koun-noumi?Mama ki mang ka kmytt'-Ato hayn?
S.TRANS: Ende sy braeghden haer seggende Is dese uwe sone welcke ghy seght Dat blindt gebooren is : Doe siet hy dan nu :
And they asked them, saying, Is this your son, who ye say was born blind? how then doth he now see?
問他們說：「這是你們的兒子嗎？你們說他生來是瞎眼的，如今怎麼能看見了呢？」

S.FORM: Ni-mattæ'i-v'si ta tæ'i-alalak tyni-æn, k'ma neini-æn, Kava-na'-n-niæn ka alak-jan ta ti atta, ka ni-pei-voutta-an appa mei-alak:
Ni-mattæ'i-v'si ta tæ'i-alalak tyni-æn, k'ma neini-æn, Kava-na'-n-niæn ka alak-jan ta ti atta, ka ni-pei-voutta-an appa mei-alak:
S.TRANS: Syne ouders antwoordden haer ende seyden Wy weten Dat dese onse sone is ende dat hy blindt geboren is :
His parents answered them and said, We know that this is our son, and that he was born blind:
他父母回答說：「他是我們的兒子，生來就瞎眼，這是我們知道的。

S.FORM: Ra mama ki mang ka kmyt-ta-ato hnyn, assi-min kavan-'an: ti-mang lava ta ni-pa-rkyllat ki matta tyn,assi-miæna 'ou-mhgan: kuh-kaha-ato ta teni keu-mha, tmauki-madoua tmaligh tyni-æn: sykkoun noung-ah ta teni pou-pænæh kisou.

Ra mama ki mang ka kmyt-ta-ato hnyn, assi-min kavan-'an: ti-mang lava ta ni-pa-rkyllat ki matta tyn,assi-miæna 'ou-mhgan: kuh-kaha-ato ta teni keu-mha, tmauki-madoua tmaligh tyni-æn: sykkoun noung-ah ta teni pou-pænæh kisou.
S.TRANS: Maer hoe hy nu siet en weten wy niet: of wie sijne oogen geopent heeft en weten wy niet: hy heeft [sijnen] ouderdom braget Hem selbe : hy sal ban hem-selben spreken.
But by what means he now seeth, we know not; or who hath opened his eyes, we know not: he is of age; ask him: he shall speak for himself.
至於他如今怎麼能看見，我們卻不知道；是誰開了他的眼睛，我們也不知道。他已經成了人，你們問他吧，他自己必能說。」

S.FORM: Ni-mattæ'i-komma-hyn-na ta t'i-alak tyni-æn, alei ki kahttakout-ten nein ki Joden. Nda ni-mattæ'i-kaha mattæ'i-sal mattæ'i-pouk ki sou ta Joden, hei-rou ka mattæ-'i-æmæ'-âl-ato ta ti-mamang ka ti Christus ta ti anna, ka pa-d'arang-eih ta teni tou Pæui-sasal-lan.

Ni-mattæ'i-komma-hyn-na ta t'i-alak tyni-æn, alei ki kahttakout-ten nein ki Joden. Nda ni-mattæ'i-kaha mattæ'i-sal mattæ'i-pouk ki sou ta Joden, hei-rou ka mattæ-'i-æmæ'-âl-ato ta ti-mamang ka ti Christus ta ti anna, ka pa-d'arang-eih ta teni tou Pæui-sasal-lan.
S.TRANS: Dit seyden sijne ouders om Dat sy De Joden breesden. Want de Joden hadhadden alreede te samen een besluyt gemaeckt soo yemandt hem belede Christum te zijn Dat Die uyt De Synagoge soude gewordpen Worden.
These words spake his parents, because they feared the Jews: for the Jews had agreed already, that if any man did confess that he was Christ, he should be put out of the synagogue.
他父母說這話，是怕猶太人；因為猶太人已經商議定了，若有認耶穌是基督的，要把他趕出會堂。

S.FORM: Alei kianna ni-k'ma ta tæ'i-alak tyni-æn, Kæuh-kaha-ato ta teni keu'-mha, tmauki-madou-a tyni-æn tmaligh
Alei kianna ni-k'ma ta tæ'i-alak tyni-æn, Kæuh-kaha-ato ta teni keu'-mha, tmauki-madou-a tyni-æn tmaligh
S.TRANS: Daerom seyden sijne ouders Hy heeft [sijnen] ouderdom braget gem selbe.
Therefore said his parents, He is of age; ask him.
因此他父母說：「他已經成了人，你們問他吧。」

S.FORM: Annata ni-mako kara-rouha ta neni tmætææm ki vouel k'anna ka ni-mavoutta kalahei, ka k'ma tyni-æn, Phei-to ki Alid ta louloug-han: kava na-'n-niæn ka tama-kavarau ta vouel k'anna.
Annata ni-mako kara-rouha ta neni tmætææm ki vouel k'anna ka ni-mavoutta kalahei, ka k'ma tyni-æn, Phei-to ki Alid ta louloug-han: kava na-'n-niæn ka tama-kavarau ta vouel k'anna.
S.TRANS: Sy dan riepen boor De twee demael den mensche die blindt geweeft was ende seyden tot hem Geeft Godt De eere : wy weten Dat dese menche een sondaer is.
Then again called they the man that was blind, and said unto him, Give God the praise: we know that this man is a sinner.
所以法利賽人第二次叫了那從前瞎眼的人來，對他說：「你該將榮耀歸給上帝，我們知道這人是個罪人。」

S.FORM: Kani-mattæ'i-v'lli ta te-ni k'ma, Ma lava ka tama-kava-rau ta teni assi-mau kavan-'an: saäsat ta ka va'na-en-nau, ka na mavoutta koh kalahei, ka kmytt'-ato-koh hnyn.
Kani-mattæ'i-v'lli ta te-ni k'ma, Ma lava ka tama-kava-rau ta teni assi-mau kavan-'an: saäsat ta ka va'na-en-nau, ka na mavoutta koh kalahei, ka kmytt'-ato-koh hnyn.
S.TRANS: Hy Dan antwoorde ende seyde Of hy een sondaer is en weet ick niet : een dinck weet ick dat ick blint was en nu zie.
He answered and said, Whether he be a sinner or no, I know not: one thing I know, that, whereas I was blind, now I see.
他說：「他是個罪人不是，我不知道；有一件事我知道，從前我是眼瞎的，如今能看見了。」

S.FORM: Ka ni-mattæ'i-la ta neni tyni-æn, Ni-oumamang ta teni ymhou-an? ni-pa-rkyllat-ten tyn mama ki mang ta matta oho?
Ka ni-mattæ'i-la ta neni tyni-æn, Ni-oumamang ta teni ymhou-an? ni-pa-rkyllat-ten tyn mama ki mang ta matta oho?
S.TRANS: Ende sy seyden weDerom tot hem Wat heeft hy u gedaen : hoe Heeft hy uwe oogen geopdent ?
Then said they to him again, What did he to thee? how opened he thine eyes?
他們就問他說：「他向你做甚麼？是怎麼開了你的眼睛呢？」

S.FORM: Ni-mattæ'i-vlli ta teni, Pattæ'i-kahan-ato-mau-kamou masousou, ka assi-kamou ni-mil-lingigh: mang ta kamoei-noumi tnalala millingigh? Mamoei-ka-mou kauwa kuh-rarauwei ka Pahtatæutæu-eih tyn ta ymou-mi-appa?

Ni-mattæ'i-vlli ta teni, Pattæ'i-kahan-ato-mau-kamou masousou, ka assi-kamou ni-millingigh: mang ta kamoei-noumi tnalala millingigh? Mamoei-ka-mou kauwa kuh-rarauwei ka Pahtatæutæu-eih tyn ta ymou-mi-appa?
S.TRANS: Hy antwoorde haer Ick Hebt u alreede geseght ende ghy en Hebt Het niet geHoort: wat wilt ghy : wederom hooren : Wilt ghy lieden oock zijne Discipelen worden :
He answered them, I have told you already, and ye did not hear: wherefore would ye hear it again? will ye also be his disciples?
他回答說：「我方才告訴你們，你們不聽，為甚麼又要聽呢？莫非你們也要作他的門徒嗎？」

S.FORM: 'Annata ni-mattæ'i-sam-muk ta neni ki sou tyni-æn, k'ma, Ymhou ta Pahtatæutæu-han tyn: ra ymi-æn ta na Pæhtatæutæuugh ti Mofses.
'Annata ni-mattæ'i-sam-muk ta neni ki sou tyni-æn, k'ma, Ymhou ta Pahtatæutæu-han tyn: ra ymi-æn ta na Pæhtatæutæuugh ti Mofses.
S.TRANS: Sy Sy gaben hem Dan scheld woorDen ende seyden Ghy zijt sijn Discipel : maer wy zijn Mosis Discipelen.
Then they reviled him, and said, Thou art his disciple; but we are Moses' disciples.
他們就罵他說：「你是他的門徒；我們是摩西的門徒。

S.FORM: Kavana-ni-æn ka ni-pa-susou-en ki Alid ti Moses-an: ta ti atta assi-miæn kavan'-an tou-mang ka ni-pakka-kouan tyn.
Kavana-ni-æn ka ni-pa-susou-en ki Alid ti Moses-an: ta ti atta assi-miæn kavan'-an tou-mang ka ni-pakka-kouan tyn.
S.TRANS: Wy weten Dat Godt tot Mosem gesproken Heeft: maerr desen en weten wy niet ban waer hy is.
We know that God spake unto Moses: as for this fellow, we know not from whence he is.
上帝對摩西說話是我們知道的；只是這個人，我們不知道他從哪裏來！」

S.FORM: Ni-mattæ'i-v'lli ta vouel kanna k'ma neini-æn, Atta ta 'ou-rynhgau-en, ka assi-moumi kavan-an ka tou-mang ta ni-pak-ka-koua'-n tyn, ietrou appa kan-na ka ni-pa-rkyllat tyn ta matta-au.
Ni-mattæ'i-v'lli ta vouel kanna k'ma neini-æn, Atta ta 'ou-rynhgau-en, ka assi-moumi kavan-an ka tou-mang ta ni-pak-ka-koua'-n tyn, ietrou appa kanna ka ni-pa-rkyllat tyn ta matta-au.
S.TRANS: De mensche antwoorde ende seyde tot haer Hier in immers [wat] wonders Dat ghy niet en weet ban waer hy is ende [nochtans] heeft Hy mijne ooghen gheopent.
The man answered and said unto them, Why herein is a marvellous thing, that ye know not from whence he is, and yet he hath opened mine eyes.
那人回答說：「他開了我的眼睛，你們竟不知道他從哪裏來，這真是奇怪！

S.FORM: Ka kavan'-an-neta ka assi sha-valei ta Alid ki tama-kava-rau: ra ti mamang ta tama-t'amud ki Aid, ahkoua appa ki kamoei-in tyn, teni ta tna-valei-en tyn.
Ka kavan'-an-neta ka assi sha-valei ta Alid ki tama-kava-rau: ra ti mamang ta tama-t'amud ki Aid, ahkoua appa ki kamoei-in tyn, teni ta tna-valei-en tyn.
S.TRANS: Ende wy weten Dat Godt De sondaers niet en Hoort : maer soo yemandt Godt bruchtigh is ende sijnen wille doet Dien hoort hy.
Now we know that God heareth not sinners: but if any man be a worshipper of God, and doeth his will, him he heareth.
我們知道上帝不聽罪人，惟有敬奉上帝、遵行他旨意的，上帝才聽他。

S.FORM: Tou [ymmid ki] ydda-rynnoug-han assi ni-illinhg-en, Ka ni-pa-tkyllat ta ti mamang ki matta ki ni-pei-voutta-an mei-alak.
Tou [ymmid ki] ydda-rynnoug-han assi ni-illinhg-en, Ka ni-pa-tkyllat ta ti mamang ki matta ki ni-pei-voutta-an mei-alak.
S.TRANS: Dan [alle] eeuwe en is het niet ghehoort Dat yemandt eens blindtgeboorenen oogen geopent Heeft.
Since the world began was it not heard that any man opened the eyes of one that was born blind.
從創世以來，未曾聽見有人把生來是瞎子的眼睛開了。

S.FORM: Heirou assi ni-makka-koua ki Alid tatianna, assi pa-il poug-ah pamut ki mamang.
Heirou assi ni-makka-koua ki Alid tatianna, assi pa-il poug-ah pamut ki mamang.
S.TRANS: Indien dese ban Godt niet en ware hy en soude niets konnen doen.
If this man were not of God, he could do nothing.
這人若不是從上帝來的，甚麼也不能做。」

S.FORM: Ni mattæ'i-vlli ta neni k'ma tyni-æn, Ni-pei-tmouk kow mei-alak tou varau ta ym-hou, ka mæhtæutæuugh-kow y-mian-æn? Ka ni-padarang tane-ni pa-'ou-mala ty ni-æn.
Ni mattæ'i-vlli ta neni k'ma tyni-æn, Ni-pei-tmouk kow mei-alak tou varau ta ymhou, ka mæhtæutæuugh-kow y-mian-æn? Ka ni-padarang tane-ni pa-'ou-mala ty ni-æn.
S.TRANS: Sy antwoorden ende seyden tot hem Ghy zijt geheel in sonden gebooren enDe leert ghy ons : Ende sy wierden hadem uyt.
They answered and said unto him, Thou wast altogether born in sins, and dost thou teach us? And they cast him out.
他們回答說：「你全然生在罪孽中，還要教訓我們嗎？」於是把他趕出去了。

S.FORM: Ni-millingigh ta ti Jesus ka ni-pa-d'arang nein pa-'ou-ma-la tyni-æn, ierou ka kabalei-en tyn ta teni ni-k'ma tyni-æn, Tna-msing kow kauwa Ki Alak ki Alid?
Ni-millingigh ta ti Jesus ka ni-pa-d'arang nein pa-'ou-ma-la tyni-æn, ierou ka kabalei-en tyn ta teni ni-k'ma tyni-æn, Tna-msing kow kauwa Ki Alak ki Alid?
S.TRANS: JeJesus hoorde dat sy hem uytgeworbpen Hadden ende Hem bindende seyde hy tot hem Gelooft ghy in den Sone Godts:
Jesus heard that they had cast him out; and when he had found him, he said unto him, Dost thou believe on the Son of God?
耶穌聽說他們把他趕出去，後來遇見他，就說：「你信上帝的兒子嗎？」

S.FORM: Ni-mattæ'i-vlli ta teni k'ma, Ti mang ta teni, Meirang, alei ka tna-msing-au-mau tyni-æn?
Ni-mattæ'i-vlli ta teni k'ma, Ti mang ta teni, Meirang, alei ka tna-msing-au-mau tyni-æn?
S.TRANS: Hy antwoorde ende seyde Wie is hy Heere op Dat ick in hem mach ghelooben?
He answered and said, Who is he, Lord, that I might believe on him?
他回答說：「主啊，誰是上帝的兒子，叫我信他呢？」

S.FORM: Ni-kma ta ti Jesus tyni-æn, Ka ni-k'ytta-en-hou ta teni, ka teni ka magh-tavagh ymhou-an, teni ta ti atta.
Ni-kma ta ti Jesus tyni-æn, Ka ni-k'ytta-en-hou ta teni, ka teni ka magh-tavagh ymhou-an, teni ta ti atta.
S.TRANS: Ende Jesus seyde tot hem Ende ghy Hebt hem gesein ende Die met u spreekt deselde is't.
And Jesus said unto him, Thou hast both seen him, and it is he that talketh with thee.
耶穌說：「你已經看見他，現在和你說話的就是他。」

S.FORM: Ni-k'ma ta teni, Tna-'msing-koh, Meirang: ka ni-reip ta teni tyni-æn.
Ni-k'ma ta teni, Tna-'msing-koh, Meirang: ka ni-reip ta teni tyni-æn.
S.TRANS: Ende hy seyde Ick geloobe Neere : ende hy aenbadt hem.
And he said, Lord, I believe. And he worshipped him.
他說：「主啊，我信！」就拜耶穌。

S.FORM: Ka ni-k'ma ta ti Jesus, Ierrou'-âto-koh tou næi katta alei ki dungdung-en, ka kmytta-ah ta neni ka assi-appa kmytta, ka ma-voutta-âl-ato ta neni ka kmyt-ta.
Ka ni-k'ma ta ti Jesus, Ierrou'-âto-koh tou næi katta alei ki dungdung-en, ka kmytta-ah ta neni ka assi-appa kmytta, ka ma-voutta-âl-ato ta neni ka kmytta.
S.TRANS: Ende Jesus seyde Ick ben tot een oordeel in Dese werelt gekomen op Dat De gene Die niet en sien sien mogen ende die sien blindt worDen.
And Jesus said, For judgment I am come into this world, that they which see not might see; and that they which see might be made blind.
耶穌說：「我為審判到這世上來，叫不能看見的，可以看見；能看見的，反瞎了眼。」

S.FORM: Ni-millingigh ki atta ta [rarouma ki] Fariseen, ka ǣ'iæ-koua tyni-æn, ka ni-k'ma ta neni tyni-æn, Mavoutta-appa-kame kauwa ta ymi-æn?
Ni-millingigh ki atta ta [rarouma ki] Fariseen, ka ǣ'iæ-koua tyni-æn, ka ni-k'ma ta neni tyni-æn, Mavoutta-appa-kame kauwa ta ymi-æn?
S.TRANS: Ende dit Hoorden [eenige] uyt De Phariseen Die hy hem waren ende seyden tot hem Zijn wy [dan] oock blindt.
And some of the Pharisees which were with him heard these words, and said unto him, Are we blind also?
同他在那裏的法利賽人聽見這話，就說：「難道我們也瞎了眼嗎？」

S.FORM: Ni-kma ta ti Jesus neini-æn, Heirou mavoutta-kamou, ynna-kamou ä'ousi ki varau: ra hnyn kmytta-kame koun-nou-mi: alei ki anna mæylli ta varau-oumi.
Ni-kma ta ti Jesus neini-æn, Heirou mavoutta-kamou, ynna-kamou ä'ousi ki varau: ra hnyn kmytta-kame koun-nou-mi: alei ki anna mæylli ta varau-oumi.
S.TRANS: Jefus seyde tot haer Indien ghy blindt waert soo en soudt ghy gheen sonde hebben: maer segget ghyWy sien : soo blijft Dan uWe sonde.
Jesus said unto them, If ye were blind, ye should have no sin: but now ye say, We see; therefore your sin remaineth.
耶穌對他們說：「你們若瞎了眼，就沒有罪了；但如今你們說『我們能看見』，所以你們的罪還在。」
